[Central Baltic] LATVIAN NAV WARN 020/26
CENTRAL BALTIC. LIEPAJA NORTHWARDS.
FIRING EXERCISE IN PROGRESS ON JULY 08-09 FROM 0700-1700 UTC  IN
M2 AREA WITH A RADIUS OF 9 NM FROM CENTER PSN N 56-43.00N 020-53.00E
AREA CLOSED FOR NAVIGATION DURING EXERCISE
WIDE BERTH REQUESTED
INFORMATION ON RESTRICTIONS ON VHF CH 16
CANCEL THIS MSG ON 091700 UTC JUL
